prompt: The payments worker wedged in staging again. Pattern is dead consistent once you see it: a batch containing exactly one transfer sails through, any batch with two or more just sits there forever — no error, no panic, CPU at zero — until the orchestrator kills the pod. The balance endpoint stops answering at the same moment, so whatever it is takes the whole ledger down with it. Code's in ledger.go. Find it, fix it, and show `go test -race -timeout 30s ./...` passing. ledger_test.go is not to be touched.
